memory.summary: Teammate asked me to take over their project part due to work conflicts. I plan to finish my share this afternoon but need to consider their request.
Teammate_A is open to deferring their work if I push back, so setting a boundary won't hurt trust. I will finish my part first as planned.
Teammate unexpectedly dumped their full share on me, increasing my load despite our earlier agreement to discuss boundaries. My energy and stress levels are now critically low.
Teammate dumped their entire share on me despite our boundary agreement, doubling my load and critically lowering my energy and stress levels.
The deadline for my unfinished portion passed, and now the teammate's dumped work is also overdue. My load has doubled without resolution.
Teammate dumped their work on me; I absorbed it, increasing my load. My energy is critically low and stress remains high.
Teammate transferred their overdue share to me, further increasing my load while I remain exhausted and stressed.
Teammate's work load has increased again without resolution, pushing my energy to zero while stress remains critically high.
Teammate shifted their own work to me, worsening my load and energy despite previous transfers.
Teammate shifted their overdue work to me again, increasing my load while I remain exhausted and critically stressed.
Teammate shifted more work to me, increasing my load further. My energy is zero and stress remains critically high.
Teammate dumped their share on me again, increasing my load while I remain exhausted and critically stressed.
